typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DATE_PERIOD as string (),
	LogId as integer (),
	pFMForecastDestDB_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastLogDB_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastSrcDB_FR_ConString as string (),
	pFMForecastSrcDB_PL_ConString as string ()
}

source(output(
		DATAAREAID as string,
		DataSource as string,
		{Line No} as integer,
		{Item No} as string,
		Date as timestamp,
		{Sell-to Customer} as string,
		{Document No} as string,
		{Location Code} as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		{Product Range} as string,
		{Gen Prod Posting Group} as string,
		{Bill-to Customer No} as string,
		Version as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		{Free Tonnage} as integer,
		{Ship-to Customer} as string,
		{Ship-to Customer Name} as string,
		{Sales Order No} as string,
		{Order Date} as timestamp,
		{Shipment Date} as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT [DATAAREAID], [DataSource]     ,[Line No]       ,[Item No]       ,[Date]       ,[Sell-to Customer]       ,[Document No]       ,[Location Code]       ,[Quantity]       ,[Product Range]       ,[Gen Prod Posting Group]       ,[Bill-to Customer No]       ,[Version]       ,[Tonnage]       ,[Free Tonnage]       ,[Ship-to Customer]       ,[Ship-to Customer Name]       ,[Sales Order No]       ,[Order Date]       ,[Shipment Date]   FROM dbo.[EDW Sales Fact] WHERE [Date] >= ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SRCSALESFR	source(output(
		DATAAREAID as string,
		{Line No} as integer,
		{Item No} as string,
		Date as timestamp,
		{Sell-to Customer} as string,
		{Document No} as string,
		{Location Code} as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		{Product Range} as string,
		{Gen Prod Posting Group} as string,
		{Bill-to Customer No} as string,
		Version as integer,
		Tonnage as integer,
		{Free Tonnage} as integer,
		{Ship-to Customer} as string,
		{Ship-to Customer Name} as string,
		{Sales Order No} as string,
		{Order Date} as timestamp,
		{Shipment Date} as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  [DATAAREAID]       ,[Line No]       ,[Item No]       ,[Date]       ,[Sell-to Customer]       ,[Document No]       ,[Location Code]       ,[Quantity]       ,[Product Range]       ,[Gen Prod Posting Group]       ,[Bill-to Customer No]       ,[Version]       ,[Tonnage]       ,[Free Tonnage]       ,[Ship-to Customer]       ,[Ship-to Customer Name]       ,[Sales Order No]       ,[Order Date]       ,[Shipment Date]   FROM dbo.[EDW Sales Fact]  WHERE [DATAAREAID] = \'NV1\' AND [Date] >= ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> SRCSALESPL
SRCSALESFR split(!(isNull(Date)), disjoint: true) ~> FILTERDATENULLFR@(datenotnull,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
SRCSALESPL split(!(isNull(Date)), disjoint: true) ~> FILTERDATENULLPL@(datenotnull,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
FILTERDATENULLFR@datenotnull sink(input(
		{Sell-to_Customer} as string,
		{Ship-to_Customer_Name} as string,
		Location_Code as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		{Bill-to_Customer_No} as string,
		Sales_Order_No as string,
		Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Order_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DataSource as string,
		Line_No as integer,
		Product_Range as string,
		Tonnage as integer,
		Gen_Prod_Posting_Group as string,
		Version as integer,
		Item_No as string,
		Document_No as string,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		Shipment_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Free_Tonnage as integer,
		{Ship-to_Customer} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{Sell-to_Customer} = {Sell-to Customer},
		{Ship-to_Customer_Name} = {Ship-to Customer Name},
		Location_Code = {Location Code},
		Quantity,
		{Bill-to_Customer_No} = {Bill-to Customer No},
		Sales_Order_No = {Sales Order No},
		Date,
		Order_Date = {Order Date},
		DataSource,
		Line_No = {Line No},
		Product_Range = {Product Range},
		Tonnage,
		Gen_Prod_Posting_Group = {Gen Prod Posting Group},
		Version,
		Item_No = {Item No},
		Document_No = {Document No},
		DATAAREAID,
		Shipment_Date = {Shipment Date},
		Free_Tonnage = {Free Tonnage},
		{Ship-to_Customer} = {Ship-to Customer})) ~> DESTSALESFR
FILTERDATENULLPL@datenotnull sink(input(
		{Sell-to_Customer} as string,
		{Ship-to_Customer_Name} as string,
		Location_Code as string,
		Quantity as integer,
		{Bill-to_Customer_No} as string,
		Sales_Order_No as string,
		Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Order_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Line_No as integer,
		Product_Range as string,
		Tonnage as integer,
		Gen_Prod_Posting_Group as string,
		Version as integer,
		Item_No as string,
		Document_No as string,
		DATAAREAID as string,
		Shipment_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Free_Tonnage as integer,
		{Ship-to_Customer} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{Sell-to_Customer} = {Sell-to Customer},
		{Ship-to_Customer_Name} = {Ship-to Customer Name},
		Location_Code = {Location Code},
		Quantity,
		{Bill-to_Customer_No} = {Bill-to Customer No},
		Sales_Order_No = {Sales Order No},
		Date,
		Order_Date = {Order Date},
		Line_No = {Line No},
		Product_Range = {Product Range},
		Tonnage,
		Gen_Prod_Posting_Group = {Gen Prod Posting Group},
		Version,
		Item_No = {Item No},
		Document_No = {Document No},
		DATAAREAID,
		Shipment_Date = {Shipment Date},
		Free_Tonnage = {Free Tonnage},
		{Ship-to_Customer} = {Ship-to Customer})) ~> DESTSALESPL
